Description: Build the identity and access foundation for FosterHub including invites, login, role templates, permission evaluation, and user-specific permission overrides.
Build the foundational child/case model, case assignments, participants, notes, and case visibility rules.
Build the intake record workflow including creation, detail management, assignment, status tracking, and conversion to case.
Build the worker-facing dashboard, case list, schedule visibility, and operational workflow entry points.
Build the caregiver-facing portal including dashboard, child detail visibility, and key contacts/resources.
Build secure in-platform messaging with threads, inbox views, unread indicators, and case-linked context.
Build the structured request workflow including submission, review, comments, attachments, and decisioning.
Build the placement process including resource homes, placement search, placement requests, responses, and recorded placements.
Build vendor invites, onboarding checklist, submissions, review queue, approval decisions, and parent-facing approved vendor visibility.
Build reusable file upload, secure storage, document linking, and document visibility enforcement across the MVP.
Build the first operational dashboard summaries and queue counts for admins and workers.
Build audit logging and consistent authorization error behavior for sensitive workflows.

Summary: Invite a new user into FosterHub
Description: As an administrator, I want to invite a new user with a starting role, so that they can securely access the system.
As a user, I want to log in and out securely, so that I can access FosterHub safely.
As an administrator, I want reusable role templates with permission sets, so that I can manage access efficiently.
As an administrator, I want to override a user’s permissions individually, so that exceptions can be handled without new roles.
As an authorized internal user, I want to create and edit child records, so that children can be represented properly in the system.
As an authorized internal user, I want to create and view case records linked to children, so that casework can be organized centrally.

Summary: Assign workers and staff to cases
Description: As a manager/admin, I want to assign internal users to cases, so that accountability is clear.

Summary: Add notes and timeline activity to cases
Description: As a worker, I want to record notes and see case activity history, so that case information is documented over time.
As a DHR/admin user, I want to create a new intake record, so that a child can enter the FosterHub workflow.
As a DHR/admin user, I want to record and update intake details and intake progress, so that downstream workflows have the information they need.

Summary: Assign worker and placement finder during intake
Description: As a DHR/admin user, I want to assign a worker and placement finder during intake, so that accountability and placement work can begin quickly.
As a DHR/admin user, I want to convert an intake into an active case, so that intake work becomes operational casework.
As a worker, I want a dashboard showing my tasks, appointments, messages, and open items, so that I can prioritize my day.
As a worker, I want to see my assigned cases, so that I can quickly understand my workload.
As a worker, I want to see my appointments in a calendar view, so that I can manage my schedule.
As a resource parent, I want a dashboard with my children, requests, messages, and appointments, so that I can quickly understand what needs attention.

Summary: View child details for children in placement
Description: As a resource parent, I want to see approved information about children in my care, so that I can support them effectively.

Summary: Access parent support resources and contacts
Description: As a resource parent, I want quick access to worker contacts and emergency resources, so that help is easy to find.

Summary: Send and receive messages in threads
Description: As a user, I want to exchange messages in secure threads, so that communication stays centralized in FosterHub.
As a user, I want an inbox with unread indicators, so that I can quickly find new communication.
As a worker, I want messages to be visible in case context where appropriate, so that communication is easier to interpret.
As a resource parent, I want to create and submit requests, so that I can ask for support or approvals in a structured way.
As a worker or DHR reviewer, I want to see incoming requests in a queue, so that I can manage them efficiently.

Summary: Approve, deny, or request more information on requests
Description: As an authorized reviewer, I want to make request decisions, so that request workflows can progress clearly.

Summary: Attach comments and documents to requests
Description: As a user, I want to attach comments and documents to requests, so that the workflow has enough context.
As a DHR/admin user, I want to manage resource home records, so that placement options are organized in the system.
As a placement finder or worker, I want to start and manage placement searches, so that I can identify suitable homes.

Summary: Send placement requests and capture responses
Description: As a placement finder, I want to send placement requests and capture responses, so that I can identify interested homes quickly.
As a DHR/admin or placement user, I want to record the selected placement, so that the child is linked to the correct home in the system.

Summary: Invite vendors and allow vendor login
Description: As a DHR/admin user, I want to invite vendors to onboard, so that they can access the vendor portal.

Summary: Support vendor onboarding checklist and submissions
Description: As a vendor, I want to see required onboarding items and submit them, so that DHR can review my application.

Summary: Review and decide on vendor applications
Description: As a DHR reviewer, I want to review vendor submissions and approve or deny them, so that vendor status is managed clearly.

Summary: Show approved public vendors to resource parents
Description: As a resource parent, I want to see approved public vendors, so that I can find approved services.
As an authorized user, I want to upload documents securely, so that records can be stored centrally.

Summary: Link documents to cases, requests, and vendor submissions
Description: As the system, I want uploaded documents to be linked to relevant records with visibility controls, so that access stays organized and secure.
As an admin/manager, I want a dashboard showing operational counts and alerts, so that I can monitor the system.
As a worker, I want a dashboard summarizing my operational work, so that I can manage my day efficiently.

Summary: Log sensitive actions in audit trail
Description: As the organization, I want sensitive actions logged, so that the system is accountable.
As a user, I want clear feedback when I cannot access something, so that the system feels understandable rather than broken.
Build backend token generation, persistence, and validation for user invites.
Build frontend screen for users to accept invites and set credentials.
Implement login, logout, and session-related endpoints.
Build login form and auth error handling.
Implement service that resolves permissions from role templates plus overrides.
Build admin UI to create and edit role templates.
Implement children data model and API endpoints.
Implement case model and API endpoints.
Build internal case list UI with filtering and navigation.
Build initial case detail layout and summary view.
Implement assignment model and endpoints for worker/supervisor/placement roles.
Build notes entry and activity timeline display for cases.
Implement intake records and endpoints.
Build intake queue list screen with filters.
Build intake detail screen with status and assignment sections.
Implement safe intake-to-case conversion logic.
Build resource parent portal layout and route shell.
Implement dashboard data endpoint scoped to resource parent visibility.

Summary: Frontend: child detail page for parents
Description: Build parent-facing child detail page with approved info only.
Build parent resources and key contacts page.
Implement threads, participants, and messages endpoints.
Build inbox list and message thread interface.
Implement unread message count logic.
Implement requests, comments, and decisions endpoints.
Build new request form with draft/submit actions.
Build reviewer queue and request detail views.
Implement approve, deny, and needs-more-info actions.

Summary: Backend: resource home schema and endpoints
Description: Implement resource home and preferences models/endpoints.
Build placement search UI and criteria filtering.

Summary: Backend: placement request and response endpoints
Description: Implement placement request creation, sending, and response capture.
Build parent-facing placement response interaction.

Summary: Backend: vendor invite and application endpoints
Description: Implement vendor onboarding invite flow and application endpoints.
Build vendor onboarding checklist and submission interface.
Build DHR-facing vendor review queue and detail screen.
Implement secure upload integration with object storage.
Build reusable file upload component for cases, requests, and vendor submissions.
Implement admin and worker dashboard summary queries.

Summary: Frontend: admin and worker dashboard cards
Description: Build dashboard summary card components.
Implement audit logging service for sensitive actions.
Implement user-friendly forbidden/unauthorized error states.
